raw_content_preview: {"findings":[{"rule_id":"R001","issue":"Auth is underspecified: login is required but auth method, roles/scopes/ownership rules, and auth-failure behavior are not defined.","severity":"high","evidence":"Notes only state: \"The endpoint requires login.\" No bearer/session method, required scopes/roles, whether user_id must match caller/admin, or 401/403 behavior is specified."},{"rule_id":"R002","issue":"Request validation rules are incomplete for path and body fields.","severity":"medium","evide
